geographic_restrictions: Primarily focused on the Rochester, New York region with national implications for photonics manufacturing.
project_area: Photonics manufacturing technologies, including optics, imaging, biomedical photonics, displays, optoelectronics, and lasers.
demographic_requirements: No specific demographic requirements mentioned; open to eligible applicants contributing to photonics industry advancement.
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants include universities, research institutions, and consortia with expertise in photonics or related fields, particularly those in the Rochester, New York region or with national photonics initiatives.
